coreResponsibility.description: A Kaltura Player plugin that integrates Kava (Kaltura Advanced Video Analytics) to track, collect, and report video playback events, user interactions, Quality of Experience (QoE) metrics, and error states to Kaltura's analytics backend.

featureOwnership: Video playback analytics tracking (VIEW, PLAY, PAUSE, RESUME, SEEK, REPLAY)
Quality of Experience (QoE) metrics collection (joinTime, bufferTime, droppedFramesRatio)
Quality of Service (QoS) metrics (bandwidth, segmentDownloadTime, manifestDownloadTime)
Bitrate and flavor tracking (FLAVOR_SWITCH, SOURCE_SELECTED, averageBitrate, actualBitrate)
Player error reporting (ERROR with errorCode, errorDetails, errorPosition)
Session management with configurable reset timeout
Periodic VIEW event reporting at configurable intervals (default 10 seconds)
Application-level event tracking (UI interactions, share, download, related, moderation features)
Live stream analytics with failed event logging to localStorage
Player state metrics (soundMode, tabMode, viewabilityMode, screenMode)
dataHandling: Kava analytics event model (eventType, eventIndex, sessionId, sessionStartTime)
Playback state tracking (isPlaying, isPaused, isBuffering, isEnded, isFirstPlay)
Dropped frames tracking and ratio calculation
User session data (userId, ks, persistentSessionId, virtualEventId)

repositories.name: playkit-js
repositories.description: Core player engine providing player events, state, and playback data

repositories.name: kaltura-player-js
repositories.description: Kaltura Player wrapper providing BasePlugin class, configuration, and provider data

repositories.name: playkit-js-providers
repositories.description: Provides OVPAnalyticsService for sending analytics requests to Kaltura backend

consumers: Any application embedding the Kaltura Player that wants video analytics

externalApis.name: Kaltura Analytics API
externalApis.description: Primary endpoint for reporting analytics events via GET or POST requests

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers 'kava' plugin with Kaltura Player
Main Kava class - core plugin implementation with event bindings and analytics logic
KavaModel class - data store for all analytics metrics and state
KavaEventModel - defines all player analytics events and their data models
KavaTimer - manages VIEW event timing and session reset countdown
KavaRateHandler - tracks and calculates bitrate statistics
